series_metadata.series_description: Records tracking Ohio Attorney General client matters assigned to outside and special counsel law firms. Also details any resulting expenses incurred by the law firms. Records include, but are not limited to, client requests for outside counsel representation, case assignment and amendment letters, submitted invoices by counsel, invoice approval letters, case summary updates, and correspondence.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Retain 6 years from end of fiscal year. ; Paper: Retain 6 years from end of fiscal year. If scanned and saved electronically, dispose of paper immediately., Electronic: Delete ; Paper: Shred
